title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BARASANAN (C) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO BALLESCAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4351 / 53 OG No. 15, 4779 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1658, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BARASANAN (C) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO BALLESCAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Barasanan (C) in the Municipality of Dao, Province of Antique, is hereby changed to Ballescas.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
